name: Spicy Chicken, Eggplant & Red Onion Quesadillas - Mesa Grill
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the water, cilantro, sliced jalapeno, lime juice, and olive oil in a blender. Blend until smooth. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
2. Place the chicken in a shallow baking dish. Pour the marinade over, coating completely. Cover and refrigerate for 4 hours.
3. Preheat the broiler. Remove the chicken from the marinade; discard the marinade. Broil the chicken until cooked through, about 3 minutes per side. Set aside.
4. Lightly brush both sides of onion and eggplant slices with vegetable oil. Sprinkle both sides with salt and pepper. Broil the vegetables until tender and golden, about 2 minutes per side.
5. Preheat the oven to 450°F. Lightly brush 4 tortillas with vegetable oil. Place the tortillas, oil side down, on a baking sheet.
6. Combine the grated cheeses in a small bowl. Sprinkle 1/4 cup cheese mixture over each tortilla. Place chicken atop the cheese, dividing equally. Place one onion slice and one eggplant slice atop each. Top each eggplant slice with one tortilla.
7. Lightly brush the tops of the tortillas with oil.
(Can be prepared up to 6 hours ahead. Cover and refrigerate.)
8. Bake quesadillas until the tortillas are slightly crisp and the cheese melts, about 10 minutes. Cut quesadillas into quarters. Serve with sour cream.
